Dialog.name: MSG_SENDER_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru Kirijo[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thank you for your time[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm not quite used to sending messages this way, so I apologize in advance if I say something rude.[n]{f 1 5 0}Are you available after school today? If you've already made plans, I don't mind joining you either.[n]{f 1 5 0}Should you find that agreeable, come find me in the hallway on the first floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Once again[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd like your help. Would you mind showing me another place again? Ideally, after school today.[n]{f 1 5 0}You can find me in the hallway on the first floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you have the time[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I won't ask you to take me somewhere to eat this time. In fact, I need your help and wisdom regarding a certain matter.[n]{f 1 5 0}Shall we head to the library together?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting at the usual spot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd like to ask you a favor[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I apologize for the short notice, but there's a place I'd like to stop by on the way back. You seem familiar with the area, so I was hoping you could show me around.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come find me if you find that agreeable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nothing important {f 1 3 153}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari told me, "You sound so angry {f 1 3 138}" and, "You're so stiff {f 1 3 138}" in response to my messages, so I've been trying to use emojis. {f 1 3 137} Is it working? {f 1 3 139}[n]I'm thinking of stopping by the library later. {f 1 3 137} Would you care to join me? {f 1 3 140}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}On the way home {f 1 3 150}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm surprised there's even an emoji for this. {f 1 3 150}[n]Shall we stop by somewhere again on the way back? If you have the time, that is. {f 1 3 150}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Another movie?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm not trying to bring up your promise the other day as an excuse, but would you indulge me in another favor?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'd like to stop by the theater on the way home.[n]{f 1 5 0}You can find me at the usual place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}(No Subject)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I know I gave you some trouble the other day. It's been on my mind this whole time.[n]{f 1 5 0}Could we meet? I'd like to talk with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}(No Subject)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm not sure how to express these feelings of mine... All I know is that you're responsible for making me this way.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you have the time, could you come see me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd like to apologize[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I would like a chance to apologize for the rude encounter the other day, as well as to inform you of the aftermath.[n]{f 1 5 0}May I have some of your time? Come look for me if that's all right with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's as if there's no end to this cold weather. {f 1 3 140} Take care of yourself so as not to get sick. {f 1 3 152}[n]How does your schedule look? Could you accompany me somewhere today?[n]{f 1 5 0}I still can't get used to using emojis. {f 1 3 138}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry to bother you[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you free today? I'd like for us to do something together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry for the trouble[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have some time to spare today. How about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you busy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you have time, let's do something together. I'll be waiting for you after school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's go somewhere[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We rarely ever get a day off, so it doesn't feel right to shut ourselves inside the dorm.[n]{f 1 5 0}I don't plan on going somewhere far. Would you care to join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Shall we watch a movie?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apologies for the sudden invitation, but would you like to watch a movie with me?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'd rather not go alone so we could discuss it afterwards.[n]{f 1 5 0}I believe it will help broaden your perspective—if you have the time.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come find me if you'd like to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Student council[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How's your progress? Have you spoken with Ms. Toriumi about joining the student council?[n]{f 1 5 0}If not, you should be able to find her in the {f 0 1 2}faculty office{f 0 1 27} after school.[n]{f 1 5 0}I look forward to you joining.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Student council[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Congratulations on joining the student council. Now you'll be permitted to enter the {f 0 1 2}student council room{f 0 1 27} for meetings.[n]{f 1 5 0}Today is one such day where we meet. I look forward to seeing you there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you free tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Naganaki Shrine is hosting a summer festival tonight.[n]{f 1 5 0}I was planning on taking Aigis there to show her around, but I'm not certain if I'd make a good guide.[n]{f 1 5 0}If it's not too much trouble, could you come along as well?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Merry Christmas[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've never thought of spending Christmas together with someone before... But then I met you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Today, I want it to be just the two of us.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting for your response.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can we talk?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a personal matter I'd like to discuss with you. Could you hear me out?[n]{f 1 5 0}But you must keep this a secret from the others.[n]{f 1 5 0}Let's talk in school. You can find me in the first-floor hallway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd like some assistance[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}As I've mentioned before, there's something I'd like to discuss with you.[n]{f 1 5 0}I know you're not personally involved, but I'd appreciate your assistance.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come find me whenever you have time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can I ask you a favor?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It concerns Amada.[n]{f 1 5 0}He seems to be keeping to himself inside his room these days. You can also hear noises coming from his room at night...[n]{f 1 5 0}Could you check in on him? It seems he respects you a lot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}About Amada[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you been able to talk to him? I would really appreciate it if you did.[n]{f 1 5 0}It seems like he's holed up in his room again today...[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}About Aragaki[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you heard anything from Aragaki about returning to school?[n]{f 1 5 0}I suppose it'd be best not to get our hopes up, but I'd still like to know how things are going.[n]{f 1 5 0}Can we meet to talk about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you have time right now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd like an update regarding the matter with Aragaki. Could you come talk to me when you're free?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Just letting you know[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll be on the second floor today. Come let me know if you want to go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Just letting you know[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll be on the third floor today. If you want to go to Tartarus, come find me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For your information[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll be in the command room today. If you want to go to Tartarus, come and let me know. I'll be able to join you as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}About the girl from last night[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Good morning.[n]{f 1 5 0}The hospital notified us earlier today that her condition has stabilized.[n]{f 1 5 0}For now, Akihiko and I will handle questioning her. You should just go about your usual routine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Regarding that matter[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you delivered the form to Aragaki?[n]{f 1 5 0}If you haven't, then you should be able to find him at {f 0 1 2}the back alley on Port Island{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 5 0}Thank you for doing this.[n]{f 1 1}
